name: Investigator Resources Limited
description: Investigator Resources Limited is an Australia-based metals exploration company focused on the discovery and development of silver, lead, and copper deposits. The company's flagship project is the 100%-owned Paris Silver Project located in South Australia, which is one of the highest-grade undeveloped silver projects in Australia. Investigator Resources also holds a diverse portfolio of other exploration tenements targeting copper, gold, and lead-zinc mineralization across South Australia and Queensland.
